prompt: Write a JADE (Jade Software language) schema file snippet that defines classes Customer, Address, and Order with realistic references and typed properties. Include at least one method on Customer that returns a formatted display label, and one method on Order that computes total including tax and discount. Return only one fenced code block and no explanations.

Write JADE language code (Jade Software) that defines an abstract base class Account and concrete subclasses SavingsAccount and CreditAccount. Include state fields, an overridden balance method, and a collection property that tracks transaction history. Return only one fenced code block.

Write JADE language code that defines a Validator class with methods validateEmail, validatePhone, and validatePostalCode. Include robust branching and explicit failure messages or error flags. Keep it as one coherent schema/code file. Return only one fenced code block.

Generate JADE (Jade Software) code for a BatchProcessor class that iterates over pending jobs, marks success/failure, records timestamps, and accumulates summary counters. Include at least two methods and explicit loop logic. Return only one fenced code block.
